code:
import io
import string
import list

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(s, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      i = i + 1
    else
      let start = i
      mut done = false
      while i < n and not done
        let c = byte_or_zero(s, i)
        if is_ws(c)
          done = true
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
      let token = string.substring(s, start, i)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        result = list.push(result, v)
      when None
        i = i
      end
    end
  end
  result
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line1 = read_or_empty()
  let line2 = read_or_empty()
  let nums = parse_ints(line1)
  let ts = parse_ints(line2)
  let t = match list.get(ts, 0)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end

  mut out = ""
  mut first = true
  let m = list.len(nums)
  mut i = 0
  while i < m
    match list.get(nums, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v > t
        if first
          out = "#{v}"
          first = false
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      end
    when None
      i = i
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(out)
end
